name: ⌞ AMERICA ⌝
description:
— a cruel officer blinded by pride.

🇺🇸🚨HETALIA — the second of the hetalia saga. Yippeeee! I have no idea what to put in here. This bot is technically my first time in trying something a bit more darker. So well go wild, beat him up if you want (I would too).

Also, did you know these Hetalia bots were named 'if I ever publish these it means I've lost all my self-respect'.
